title: Make command-center agent approvals visible
description: Update the command-center wrapper and runtime policy so core agents, helpers, and assistants launch through an operator-reachable surface, allowing headless hcom only when the ai command can inspect, message, approve, and stop the session.
acceptance_criteria: ai start launches core agents in visible terminals instead of using the headless start-agents script
ai helper start launches helpers in a visible terminal
Command-center CLI exposes a way to inspect and answer agent approval prompts
Runtime policy documents visible terminal and approval handling defaults
ai helper start launches helpers through an operator-reachable command-center surface
Runtime policy documents that headless hcom is allowed only when managed through AI Command Center controls
